name: podium-mcp
description: Mobile E2E MCP server — 51 tools for iOS (simulator + real) and Android (emulator + real) device control, native UI automation, end-to-end Maestro flows, React Native debugging, WebView DOM, no-vision Unity/GL game-engine automation, and a no-vision canvas brain (Pixi/Konva/Fabric/Phaser/Three/Babylon). Requires macOS + Xcode.
